channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Black bags left on Allerton Road, 9th July
item.description:
Two black bags left on Allerton Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lordship Park, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: We have a large pothole outside our main gate., 9th July
item.description:
Phoenix Primary School, We have had to close our main entrance due to how hollow underneath is around this area. We have demonstrated how hollow it is underneath in the photos. Due to the amount of foot traffic that comes through this gate, this is a major Health and Safety issue. We are concerned that someone could fall through this and cause a major injury. This will cause us major Health and safety issues, due to us having to use a different entrance, which isn't large enough for the amount of foot traffic we expect, daily (AM, drop off and PM, collection). We have reported this entrance a number of times and small repairs have been completed but now based on what we have observed survivor deterioration of this entrance. We have had a number of complaints from parents and staff regarding this ever growing hole and the worry of accidents.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marlborough Grove, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tablets/Medication dumped under the tree, 9th July
item.description:
Tablets found under the tree, corner of Diamond Street and Chandler way. I'll keep reporting the rubbish problem till Southwark do something about this . I hope no children pick these up these tablets mistaking them for sweets

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chandler Way, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-Posting, 9th July
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 08/07/26 19:28 Fly-posting Lat/Long - 51.4187457, -0.0796083 what3words - spin.fault.jumped Nearest address - Century House, 37 Church Road, Anerley, London, SE19 2TE stickers on a lamp post Reference - 5707571 Map link - open Google map Report history - Status: Received 08/07/2026 19:27 stickers on a lamp post
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Church Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New watering bag needed for young tree, 9th July
item.description:
Please can you replace the watering bag for the tree outside 58/60 Harwood Avenue Bromley. The straps attaching the current bag to the support stakes has ripped. The bag is now not elevated from the ground meaning water is not seeping out and watering the tree.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harwood Avenue, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on Green box, 9th July
item.description:
On roundabout

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waste collectors have been dumping food waste, 9th July
item.description:
Last few weeks people's food waste has been dumped on mass in my neighbours (lidless) black bin before collection. I gets rounded up by someone early on collection day, then it rots in his bin in the heat where flies swarm and we exit our front door to a pretty grim scene. Now he's locked his bins together to stop them doing this, they've dumped the food waste outside our houses on the street. It's absolutely crawling. Can we please stop this happening ASAP?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Springrice Road, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wood flytipped, 9th July
item.description:
Load of wood dumped by milepost outside Gails cafe.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bush overhanging pavement obstructing pedestrians, 9th July
item.description:
Bush has been over hanging the pavement for a few weeks getting increasingly worse. Somebody visually impaired could be seriously injured by the branches as there is no no space to walk past on the pavement safely.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Avenue, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping - Fridges, fridge freezer and other rubbish, 9th July
item.description:
Flytipping. Fridge, fridge freezer, door and other rubbish. Please could it be removed. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eltham Palace Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please remove it from this spot, 9th July
item.description:
Some kind of green waste/ sand/ rubble has been added to this spot on the lawn area Reported previously ( FixMyStreet ref: 9731796) but not removed yet! Please clear it out- Colegrove road- on the lawn

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colegrove Road, Peckham, Greater London
